# MPSGraphPoolingReturnIndicesMode.localFlatten2D

**Case**

Returns indices within pooling window, flattened in 2 innermost dimensions. eg: HW in NCHW.

## Declaration

```swift
case localFlatten2D
```
title: MPSGraphPoolingReturnIndicesMode.localFlatten2D
